◎片　　名　Den unge Zlatan

◎导　　演　Fredrik Gertten Fredrik Gertten / 马格努斯·格滕 Magnus Gertten

◎简　　介  

　　The decisive years of Swedish footballer Zlatan Ibrahimovic, told through rare archival footage where a young Zlatan speaks openly about his life and challenges. The film closely follows Zlatan, from his debut in Malmö FF in 1999, through his conflictual years with Ajax Amsterdam, up to the final breakthrough with Juventus in 2005.
